nodes.label: 澳洲日常服务表达 / Daily service phrase bank
nodes.description: 按日常服务场景整理：寒暄、咖啡点单、购物退换货、付款、礼貌回应和健身房咨询。

nodes.label: 开场寒暄 / Greeting
nodes.description: 日常服务、咖啡店和柜台场景的轻量寒暄。

nodes.label: How ya going?
nodes.description: 澳洲服务场景常见寒暄。

nodes.label: How's it going?
Yeah, not too bad. Yourself?
咖啡点单 / Coffee ordering
nodes.description: 咖啡店点单、外带、少甜、等待和堂食外带确认。

nodes.label: Can I get a medium latte, takeaway, please?
nodes.description: 澳洲咖啡店自然点单；takeaway 比 to go 更本地化。

nodes.label: Takeaway, please.
Could you make it less sweet?
nodes.description: 请求少甜；比 reduce the sugar 更自然。

nodes.label: How long's the wait?
I'll just wait over there.
Can I get a medium oat latte, please?
nodes.description: 点单用 Can I get... 很自然。

nodes.label: For here or takeaway?
nodes.description: 询问堂食或外带；澳洲常用 takeaway。

nodes.label: Takeaway, please.
Any sugar?
nodes.description: 服务场景里询问是否加糖。

nodes.label: 购物退换货 / Shopping returns and exchanges
nodes.description: 退货、换货、退款和商品故障相关表达。

nodes.label: I'd like to return this item.
nodes.description: 退货说 return this item，不说 refund this good。

nodes.label: What seems to be the problem?
nodes.description: 服务人员询问商品问题。

nodes.label: I realised it was faulty.
nodes.description: 说明买回去后发现有故障。

nodes.label: We can give you a refund or exchange it for a new one.
I'll take a replacement, please.
付款 / Payment
nodes.description: 柜台付款、金额和刷卡相关表达。

nodes.label: That'll be six fifty.
Can I pay by card?
nodes.description: 询问是否可以刷卡/银行卡支付。

nodes.label: 礼貌回应 / Polite responses
nodes.description: 等待、递交物品和回应对方时的自然短句。

nodes.label: No worries.
nodes.description: 澳洲高频表达：没问题、不客气、可以。

nodes.label: Just give me a moment.
Sure, here you go.
nodes.description: 递交物品、小票、证件时常用。

nodes.label: 健身房咨询 / Gym membership
nodes.description: 咨询健身房会员和服务计划。

nodes.label: I'd like to ask about your membership plans.
澳洲医疗与药房表达 / Healthcare and pharmacy phrase bank
nodes.description: 把 GP 预约、症状描述、药房买药和医保保险相关表达集中整理，便于医疗场景复习。

nodes.label: 预约 GP / Booking a GP appointment
nodes.description: 电话预约 GP、说明新病人身份、确认空位和时间。

nodes.label: I'd like to book an appointment with a GP.
nodes.description: 预约看医生用 appointment，不用 reservation。

nodes.label: Do you have any appointments available today?
nodes.description: 询问今天有没有预约空位。

nodes.label: I'm a new patient. I haven't been here before.
I'll take the 10:30 tomorrow morning.
描述症状 / Describing symptoms
nodes.description: 描述胃不舒服、感冒、鼻塞和喉咙痛。

nodes.label: I just have a bit of an upset stomach.
I've got a bit of a cold.
nodes.description: 我有点感冒；不要说 I'm a little bit cold。

nodes.label: I've got a blocked nose.
I've got a bit of a sore throat.
药房用药需求 / Pharmacy medicine requests
nodes.description: 确认白天用药、是否犯困以及饭前饭后服用。

nodes.label: Something for daytime, please.
I don't want anything that'll make me drowsy.
nodes.description: 不想要会犯困的药；drowsy 在药房场景很常用。

nodes.label: Should I take this before or after food?
医保与保险 / Medicare and insurance
nodes.description: 说明 Medicare 和私人医疗保险情况。

nodes.label: I don't have Medicare, but I have private health insurance.
nodes.description: 说明没有 Medicare 但有私人保险。

nodes.label: 澳洲租房与居住表达 / Rental and housing phrase bank
nodes.description: 按租房流程整理：看房预约、租客身份、报修维护、房型家具、租金费用和网络设置。

nodes.label: 看房预约 / Rental inspection
nodes.description: 看房说明来意、确认是否预约以及预约时间。

nodes.label: I'm here for the inspection.
nodes.description: 澳洲租房看房常说 inspection。

nodes.label: I'm here for the inspection.
Have you booked an inspection?
I booked the 2 pm inspection.
租客身份和住址 / Tenant and address
nodes.description: 说明租客身份、房号地址和刚租好住处。

nodes.label: I'm the tenant in Unit 302 at 18 Brisbane Road.
nodes.description: 说明租客身份和澳洲地址。

nodes.label: I recently rented a place.
租房报修 / Rental maintenance
nodes.description: 联系 property manager 报修热水器、说明问题持续时间和预约维修上门。

nodes.label: I'd like to report an issue with the hot water system.
nodes.description: 报修热水器；report an issue with 很自然。

nodes.label: There's no hot water when I shower.
It's been going on for two days.
Tomorrow morning would be best.
nodes.description: 礼貌说明最好明天上午上门。

nodes.label: Could you send me a confirmation by text or email?
nodes.description: 请对方通过短信或邮件确认。

nodes.label: 租金与居住费用 / Rent and utilities
nodes.description: 房型、家具、费用包含和网络设置。

nodes.label: This is a two-bedroom apartment.
Most of the furniture is included.
Are utilities included in the rent?
nodes.description: 询问水电网等费用是否包含。

nodes.label: You'll need to set up your own internet.
澳洲银行与办理表达 / Banking and admin phrase bank
nodes.description: 把银行开户、证件地址、银行卡问题、安全提醒和办理流程归到同一类。

nodes.label: 开户与账户类型 / Account opening
nodes.description: 银行开户、选择账户类型和日常交易账户表达。

nodes.label: I'd like to open a bank account.
I'm looking to open an account.
nodes.description: 银行开户表达，比 I want to open 更自然。

nodes.label: Just a transaction account for now.
nodes.description: 银行开户时表示先开日常消费账户。

nodes.label: Would you like a savings account or a transaction account?
证件和地址 / Documents and address
nodes.description: 银行等机构确认澳洲地址、护照、签证和电子签证。

nodes.label: Do you currently have an Australian address?
nodes.description: 银行等机构询问澳洲地址。

nodes.label: I'll also need your passport and visa.
Is an electronic visa okay?
nodes.description: 询问电子签证是否可以。

nodes.label: 银行卡与安全提醒 / Card issues and security
nodes.description: 银行卡刷不了、交易失败、安全提醒、异常活动、解冻、补卡和手机支付。

nodes.label: My card got declined today.
The payment didn't go through.
I got a security alert from my bank.
There might be unusual activity on my account.
Can this card be reactivated today?
nodes.description: 询问这张卡今天能否重新激活。

nodes.label: Could you order me a replacement card?
Can I still use my phone to pay in the meantime?
nodes.description: 询问期间是否还能用手机支付。

nodes.label: 办理流程和下一步 / Admin next steps
nodes.description: 说明工作日、询问下一步和提交申请。

nodes.label: within a few business days
nodes.description: 银行、物流、行政场景里的“几个工作日内”。

nodes.label: What should I do next?
What's the next step?
You'll need to submit an application.
澳洲办公室闲聊表达 / Office small talk phrase bank
nodes.description: 同事之间轻量聊天时使用的澳洲口语归纳，按午饭咖啡、饮食偏好、忙碌状态和短回应整理。

nodes.label: 约午饭和咖啡 / Lunch and coffee
nodes.description: 办公室午休、咖啡和附近餐厅闲聊。

nodes.label: Any lunch plans today?
What are you having for lunch today?
I might just grab something quick.
A new Thai place just opened downstairs.
Keen to try it?
饮食偏好 / Food preferences
nodes.description: 表达能不能吃辣、有没有不辣选项。

nodes.label: I'm not really into spicy food.
I can't really handle spicy food.
They've got non-spicy options too.
忙碌加班 / Being busy
nodes.description: 表达最近忙、项目赶或加班。

nodes.label: Have you been working overtime lately?
We've been pretty flat out lately.
The project's been pretty hectic lately.
I've been pretty slammed this week.
轻量回应 / Short responses
nodes.description: 办公室闲聊里的自然短句。

nodes.label: Sounds good.
Might grab a coffee as well.
Probably just gonna grab something nearby.
nodes.description: 大概就在附近随便买点。

graphs.graphLabel: 工程协作与敏捷交付表达

nodes.label: 工程协作与敏捷交付表达 / Engineering collaboration and agile delivery phrase bank
nodes.description: 把站会进度、澄清同步、问题风险、依赖阻塞、估算时间线和需求变更集中整理。

nodes.label: 进度沟通 / Progress updates
nodes.description: 站会、任务进度询问和完成情况汇报。

nodes.label: Do you think you can finish this feature today?
nodes.description: 比 Can you finish... 更委婉。

nodes.label: How's it going?
What did you work on yesterday?
Any updates on this?
I should be able to.
I finished refactoring the login module yesterday.
Overall it's been pretty smooth.
I'll add more test coverage today.
澄清与同步 / Clarifying and syncing
nodes.description: 说明不确定点，并和 PM、后端或相关方同步确认。

nodes.label: I still need to check a few things with the API.
nodes.description: 还需要确认 API 细节。

nodes.label: The user permission logic is still a bit unclear.
nodes.description: 用户权限逻辑还不清晰。

nodes.label: I need to clarify that part first.
I'm not 100% sure about the API contract yet.
nodes.description: API contract 还不完全确定。

nodes.label: Maybe sync with the PM this afternoon.
nodes.description: 下午和 PM 对一下。

nodes.label: Should we sync with the backend team first?
I'll continue once I've clarified that part.
Might be worth confirming with the backend side first.
nodes.description: 委婉建议先和后端确认。

nodes.label: 问题、风险与阻塞 / Issues, risks and blockers
nodes.description: 描述问题、旧系统风险、依赖、blocker 和测试风险。

nodes.label: We ran into some issues.
I found a few issues in the legacy code.
The legacy system uses inconsistent data formats.
nodes.description: 旧系统数据格式不统一。

nodes.label: There are a few edge cases we haven't covered yet.
This part is still a bit unclear.
There's a dependency that hasn't been confirmed.
We're waiting on the backend team.
This depends on the API changes.
nodes.description: 这取决于 API 变更。

nodes.label: The backend contract hasn't been finalised yet.
nodes.description: 后端 contract 还没最终确定。

nodes.label: This might become a blocker.
Any risks?
Any blockers?
The main risk is the legacy data format.
nodes.description: 主要风险是旧数据格式。

nodes.label: We might run into issues during testing.
估算与时间线 / Estimates and timeline
nodes.description: 估算工作量、说明前提、上线影响和目标发布日期。

nodes.label: This might impact the timeline.
This could affect this week's release.
It might push the release back.
It could take longer than expected.
We may need to adjust the timeline.
How long do you think this will take?
What's your estimate for this task?
It should take around two days.
I'll estimate the effort first.
Assuming there are no API changes, it should take around two days.
As long as the API stays the same, it should be fine.
nodes.description: 只要 API 不变就可以。

nodes.label: This estimate assumes the backend contract is stable.
nodes.description: 估算假设后端 contract 稳定。

nodes.label: Is there a timeline for this requirement?
Do we have a target release date?
The client wants this done as soon as possible.
Let's put this into the current sprint for now.
需求变更与影响范围 / Requirement changes and impact scope
nodes.description: 客户新需求、范围变化、数据结构和前后端影响范围。

nodes.label: The client just brought up a new requirement.
Is it a minor change, or will it affect the current logic?
nodes.description: 是小改动还是会影响当前逻辑？

nodes.label: They want us to support role-based access control.
The scope is slightly different now.
We might need to adjust the current data structure.
nodes.description: 可能需要调整数据结构。

nodes.label: The frontend team will probably need to make quite a few changes as well.
I'll assess the impact scope first.
We need to understand the affected areas first.
Code Review 与架构表达 / Code review and architecture phrase bank
nodes.description: PR 反馈、代码质量、职责边界、重构、抽象和可维护性讨论的表达归纳。

nodes.label: 给 Review 反馈 / Review feedback
nodes.description: 给 PR Review 反馈和总体评价。

nodes.label: I just had a look at your PR.
Overall it looks good.
There are still a few areas we could improve.
nodes.description: 还有几个地方可以优化。

nodes.label: A couple of things could be cleaned up.
询问修改 / Asking what to fix
Anything I should fix?
Any changes needed?
Anything I need to update?
提出担心 / Raising concerns
nodes.description: 提出性能、结构或维护风险。

nodes.label: There's one thing I'm a bit concerned about.
I have a small concern around this part.
nodes.description: 我对这一部分有点担心。

nodes.label: This might be a performance issue.
职责边界 / Responsibility boundaries
nodes.description: 说明 service、controller 或 class 职责过多。

nodes.label: This service has too many responsibilities.
nodes.description: 这个 service 职责太多。

nodes.label: This service is handling too much logic.
nodes.description: 这个 service 处理太多逻辑。

nodes.label: There seems to be too much business logic in the controller.
This class is doing too much.
nodes.description: 这个 class 做太多事。

nodes.label: 建议重构 / Refactoring suggestions
nodes.description: 建议拆分、抽象、移动到 service 层。

nodes.label: Should we move it into the service layer?
Should we extract this into a separate service?
We could split this logic up.
Some of the logic could be abstracted further.
nodes.description: 部分逻辑可以进一步抽象。

nodes.label: 可维护性与技术债 / Maintainability and technical debt
nodes.description: 说明后续维护成本和技术债风险。

nodes.label: It could cause maintainability issues later.
nodes.description: 后面可能有可维护性问题。

nodes.label: It might become harder to maintain later on.
This might introduce technical debt.
常见表达纠错 / Common corrections
nodes.description: 按实际场景整理中式直译、词义误用、可数性和动词搭配问题，便于从错误表达快速替换成自然英文。

nodes.label: 医疗与药房纠错 / Healthcare corrections
nodes.description: 预约、病人身份、保险、感冒鼻塞和吃药表达纠错。

nodes.label: book an appointment / not book a reservation
nodes.description: 看医生、办事预约用 appointment。

nodes.label: appointments available / not available seats
existing patient / not old patient
nodes.description: 老病人/已登记病人说 existing patient。

nodes.label: private health insurance / not personal insurance
nodes.description: 私人医疗保险说 private health insurance。

nodes.label: I've got a cold / not I'm cold
nodes.description: I'm cold 是觉得冷，不是感冒。

nodes.label: blocked nose / not my nose is blocking
take medicine / not have medicine
租房、银行与生活办理纠错 / Rental, banking and settlement corrections
nodes.description: 银行卡、租客、维修人员、网络、会员和账户类型相关纠错。

nodes.label: card got declined / not card is unavailable
nodes.description: 银行卡被拒付用 got declined。

nodes.label: tenant / not renter
nodes.description: 租房正式场景更常用 tenant。

nodes.label: tradesperson / not maintainer
nodes.description: 租房维修人员可说 tradesperson、technician 或 plumber。

nodes.label: internet / not network
nodes.description: 生活场景里的网络说 internet。

nodes.label: membership / not VIP plans
furniture / not furnitures
savings account
set up your own internet
nodes.description: 办理网络说 set up internet。

nodes.label: 工程与架构表达纠错 / Engineering corrections
nodes.description: 代码、上线、service layer、API 确认和影响范围相关纠错。

nodes.label: release / not always deployment
too much business logic / not many business logics
legacy code / not old codes
move it into the service layer
nodes.description: 不要说 separate to the service layer。

nodes.label: check a few things with the API
nodes.description: 确认 API 细节用 check with/about。

nodes.label: impact scope / affected areas
购物动词搭配纠错 / Shopping verb patterns
nodes.description: 退货、换货等服务场景常见动词搭配。

nodes.label: return this item / not refund this good
exchange it for a new one
nodes.description: 换成新的要用 exchange it for。

nodes.label: 中文直译纠错 / Direct translation corrections
nodes.description: otherwise、估算耗时、午饭和吃辣等中式直译替换。

nodes.label: otherwise ≠ also
How long do you think this will take?
nodes.description: 不要说 How long can you finish this task。

nodes.label: What are you having for lunch?
nodes.description: 不要说 What do you plan to eat this noon。

nodes.label: I'm not really into spicy food.
nodes.description: 不要说 I cannot eat too spicy。
